name: EETQ
expansion: Easy and Efficient Quantization for Transformers
oneliner: Simple 8-bit weight-only quantization — drop-in replacement with minimal setup. No calibration needed.
explanation: A straightforward per-channel int8 weight quantization library. No calibration data, no complex algorithms — just absmax scaling per output channel. Trades off accuracy optimization (no Hessian, no activation-awareness) for simplicity and speed. Works well for int8 where the quality gap between methods is small. Integrates with HuggingFace Transformers.
fundamentals: Per-channel symmetric quantization: scale_j = max(|W[j,:]|) / 127. W_int8[j,:] = round(W[j,:] / scale_j). At inference: dequantize to fp16 and compute. That's it.
